name: Apricot Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and sugar.
3. Add the milk, beaten egg, orange peel, vegetable oil, and whole wheat flour to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the dried apricots and chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased bread loaf pan.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it.
